heroHeadline: Vance Warns Iran 'Dumb' to Reject Lebanon Ceasefire; Macron Adds Pressure as Beirut Burns
heroSubtitle: VP Vance pressures Iran to extend the truce to Lebanon as French President Macron adds European diplomatic weight to the demand. Israeli strikes continue razing residential buildings in Beirut despite the US-Iran ceasefire — Netanyahu maintains the truce does not cover Lebanon.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com.
